get.description:
Return issues relevant to the calling agent/user.

Identity is resolved from the ``X-Agent-Id`` header first, falling
back to the ``agent_id`` query parameter.

schema.title: Response List My Issues Issues My Get
Response Dispatch Issue Issues  Issue Id  Dispatch Post
Response List Issues Api Issues Get

get.description:
Return issues relevant to the calling agent/user.

Identity is resolved from the ``X-Agent-Id`` header first, falling
back to the ``agent_id`` query parameter.

schema.title: Response List My Issues Api Issues My Get
Response Dispatch Issue Api Issues  Issue Id  Dispatch Post
Response List Integrations Settings Integrations Get
Response List Tokens Settings Api Tokens Get
Response Bulk Archive Inbox Bulk Archive Post
Response Save Topology Squads  Squad Id  Topology Post
Response Get Topology Squads  Squad Id  Topology Get
Response List Tasks Api Tasks Get

post.description: Reconcile from squad-tasks.json and HerdMaster into Postgres.

get.description:
Proxy: list tasks directly from HerdMaster's live API.

Requires the message bus (HerdMasterAuthClient) to be connected.

schema.title: Response List Herdmaster Tasks Api Tasks Herdmaster Get

Requires the message bus (HerdMasterAuthClient) to be connected.

Cost breakdown grouped by an attribution dimension.

Supported dimensions: model, issue_id, agent_id, runtime_id.

OperationMode.title: OperationMode
OperationMode.description: Execution mode selected per task and honored by the dispatcher.

ProjectStatus.title: ProjectStatus
ProjectStatus.description: Lifecycle states for a project row.

RuntimeMessageRequest.title: RuntimeMessageRequest
RuntimeMessageRequest.description: HTTP body for runtime agent-to-agent messaging.

TaskStatus.title: TaskStatus
TaskStatus.description: Squad-task lifecycle states (mirrors squad-tasks.json status values).

TokenCreateResponse.title: TokenCreateResponse
TokenCreateResponse.description: Returned only on creation — includes the raw token value (shown once).
